content:
# Wait for health before starting dependents
        # Supervision loop

        # Shutdown: stop all services in reverse order
        self._log("Shutting down all services")
        for name in reversed(list(self.processes.keys())):
            await self.stop_service(name)
        self._running = False
        self.write_state()
```
